Buyer's question

What Is Claude Enterprise? Claude for larger orgs and regulated use.

Claude Enterprise is Anthropic's top-tier plan — designed for larger organizations, regulated industries, and use cases needing the strongest data handling commitments. Here's what's in it and who should consider it.

Short answer

Claude Enterprise is Anthropic's top business tier — adds SSO/SCIM, expanded admin and audit, larger context windows, custom data retention, and signed agreements (DPA, BAA). For organizations with 150+ seats, regulated data, or compliance commitments.

By Bill Colbert · Founder, Treetop Growth Strategy
Published May 2026 · More from the library

What's in Enterprise that Team doesn't have

  • SSO with SAML / Okta / Azure AD / Google Workspace.
  • SCIM provisioning — automate user lifecycle from your IdP.
  • Enhanced audit logging — track admin actions and usage at the audit level.
  • Custom data retention — configure how long conversation data is retained.
  • Signed BAA available for healthcare customers handling PHI.
  • Signed DPA for EU customers.
  • Higher rate limits and expanded context windows on supported models.
  • Dedicated customer success contact at Anthropic.

Who needs Enterprise

  • Organizations with 150+ Claude seats.
  • Healthcare organizations handling PHI (require BAA).
  • Financial services firms with stringent compliance.
  • Legal firms with confidentiality requirements that need enhanced audit.
  • Companies with corporate SSO requirements.
  • EU-based or EU-serving companies needing DPA + data residency.
  • Public sector / government contracting where audit requirements apply.

How to think about the cost

Enterprise is priced individually, not per-seat publicly. Cost scales with seats and features. Typical enterprise pricing is meaningfully higher per-seat than Team — but at scale, the security and compliance features are worth it.

If you do NOT have a specific reason to need Enterprise features, Team is fine. Many organizations overspend by buying Enterprise when Team would have sufficed.

How to evaluate

  1. List the specific features you need (BAA? SSO? SCIM? expanded context?).
  2. Match those to what's available in Team vs Enterprise.
  3. If everything you need is in Team, save the money.
  4. If you need 2+ Enterprise-only features, upgrade is justified.

FAQ

How do I get a BAA for Claude?

Through Claude Enterprise sales. BAA is not available on Team or Pro tiers.

Can I get Enterprise for a small team?

Sometimes — Anthropic will sometimes accommodate smaller orgs that need Enterprise features (BAA, SSO). Discuss with sales.

Is Enterprise required for SOC 2 compliance?

Not always. Anthropic's SOC 2 report applies across tiers. Enterprise adds features that make YOUR SOC 2 commitments easier to meet.

Can I switch from Team to Enterprise smoothly?

Yes. Anthropic supports the upgrade path; data and Projects move with you.

How does Claude Enterprise compare to ChatGPT Enterprise?

Comparable feature sets. Picking between them often comes down to other factors (writing quality, integration needs).
